response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates strong distributed systems and infrastructure experience, they fall significantly short on critical minimum qualifications: only ~1 year of C++ programming versus the required 8 years, and no clear evidence of formal technical leadership in a mentoring capacity. The resume shows broad full-stack expertise across many languages and platforms, but lacks the specialized depth in C++ and the formal technical leadership track record needed for this cloud compute platform role.
strengths: Proven experience building and operating large-scale distributed systems handling millions of requests per second (Dunnhumby microservices)
Demonstrated expertise in infrastructure technologies including Kubernetes, Docker, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Strong mentoring and knowledge-sharing track record through workshops, code katas, and teaching, indicating capacity for technical leadership growth
concerns: Critical gap in C++ experience: only ~1 year documented versus 8 years required as minimum qualification
No formal technical leadership role or evidence of leading engineering teams, despite senior/staff titles across roles
Broad technology focus (JavaScript, DLang, multiple platforms) without sustained specialization in C++ or cloud compute platforms
